summary: Iteration 51: Complete testing of Bangla language support and Performance Report features. Backend: 11/11 tests passed for GET /api/performance-report endpoint with various period parameters (7/14/30/60/90 days). Frontend: Bangla language switch working correctly - navigation labels, dashboard text, and UI elements properly translated. Performance Report page fully functional with Overview, Employees, Branches, Expenses tabs, period selector, and KPI cards.

issues: Minor React hydration warnings in console: <span> cannot be child of <tbody>, <tr> cannot be child of <span>. These are display:contents wrapper issues but don't affect functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: Bangla (bn) translations well implemented in i18n.js - line 734 onwards with full navigation, dashboard, sales, expenses, employees, stock, invoices, reports, and other UI text translations.
LANGUAGES array includes Bangla with flag='বা' and rtl=false which is correct since Bangla is LTR.
Performance Report API endpoint well structured returning kpi, sales_trend, branch_ranking, employee_performance, expense_breakdown, payment_distribution with proper data aggregation.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (57K SAR sales, 193K SAR expenses over 30 days, 2 employees, multiple branches, 62.5% task compliance)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bangla language and Performance Report features fully tested. Bangla translations at /app/frontend/src/lib/i18n.js line 734-923 with full nav, dashboard, sales, expenses, employees, stock, invoices, reports translations. LANGUAGES array at line 924 includes {code: 'bn', label: 'বাংলা', flag: 'বা', rtl: false}. Language dropdown accessible via data-testid='language-dropdown'. Performance Report page at /performance-report with route in App.js line 148. Sidebar link in DashboardLayout.jsx line 74 under Reports group. Backend endpoint GET /api/performance-report?period=N returns: kpi (total_sales, total_expenses, net_profit, profit_margin, total_transactions, avg_transaction, total_salary_paid, employee_count, task_compliance, *_growth), sales_trend (array of {date, sales, expenses, profit}), branch_ranking (array of {branch_id, name, sales, expenses, profit, transactions, avg_ticket}), employee_performance (array of {id, name, role, branch, tasks_received, tasks_completed, compliance, status}), expense_breakdown (array of {category, amount}), payment_distribution (array of {mode, amount}), period_days.

bangla_language_switch.navigation_translation: PASS - Sidebar shows ড্যাশবোর্ড, কার্যক্রম, আর্থিক, জনবল, স্টক, etc.
bangla_language_switch.dashboard_translation: PASS - Dashboard header shows Bengali text
bangla_language_switch.switch_back_to_english: PASS - English option restores English labels

tabs.employees: PASS - data-testid='tab-employees' shows employee performance table
tabs.branches: PASS - data-testid='tab-branches' shows branch performance chart
tabs.expenses: PASS - data-testid='tab-expenses' shows expense breakdown chart

period_selector.7_days: PASS - Data reloads with 7-day period (SAR 13,667.49 sales, SAR 2,100 expenses, 17 transactions)

charts.sales_trend: PASS - data-testid='sales-trend-chart' shows Sales & Profit Trend
charts.quick_stats: PASS - data-testid='quick-stats' shows Avg Transaction, Profit Margin, Total Employees, Salary Paid, Task Compliance

backend_api_tests.GET /api/performance-report (default): PASS - Returns all fields with period_days=30
backend_api_tests.kpi_structure: PASS - Contains total_sales, total_expenses, net_profit, profit_margin, total_transactions, avg_transaction, total_salary_paid, employee_count, task_compliance
backend_api_tests.sales_trend_structure: PASS - Array of {date, sales, expenses, profit}
backend_api_tests.branch_ranking_structure: PASS - Array of {branch_id, name, sales, expenses, profit, transactions, avg_ticket}
backend_api_tests.employee_performance_structure: PASS - Array of {id, name, role, branch, tasks_received, tasks_completed, compliance, status}
